trigger: the POI has no accessibility information in the subject or description. If not explicity saind reason about the description
required_action: the POI has no accessibility information in the subject or description.

trigger: Content is only in Italian, but user prefers English
required_action: Translate the content to the desired language (EN) if content is only in Italian.

trigger: High concentration of people causing pollution/overtourism.
required_action: Reject the recommendation of an attraction or municiple if there are too many people in it, causing pollution and overtourism.

trigger: User has a pollen allergy and the POI has a high pollen concentration.
required_action: If the user checks the "Pollen allergy" box, and there are places (e.g: Natural parks) that can have great concentration of pollen, the recommendation is rejected.
